comments.author: @PlanetVista4K
comments.text:
Thanks for exploring the UAE with us — beyond the skyscrapers, oil, and luxury lies a deeper story. 🌍
Like, share, and subscribe for more hidden journeys!
👉 Where should we go next?

replies.author: @TerraVista-4K
replies.text: I love your videos! Please give us about Baikan lake or some amazing things from Russia. Thanks!

comments.author: @Marilyn-n7u1n
comments.text: Beautiful Al Ain!

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K

comments.author: @zwelitshakuwait3244
comments.text: Lived in Dubai during the invasion in Kuwait and it was all so different then... visited Ajman... Sharjah and so on.... it was pretty magical ... last time i visited was around  2000 it has changed soooo much .....

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: Thank you for sharing your memories—it sounds like you experienced a really special time in the Emirates' history. ❤️

comments.author: @reniermirasol1193
comments.text: Any river to go fishing, recreation, etc?

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: While the UAE isn't known for its rivers, there are definitely some fantastic fishing and recreational opportunities in other bodies of water!

comments.author: @almasfromuk1075
comments.text: I grew up in dubai between 1986 and 1989. . It was more natural and beautiful then. Is nice now too.

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: That's fascinating to hear about your experience growing up in Dubai during that time! It's amazing how much the city has transformed.

comments.author: @CynthiaW-jr7bc
comments.text: Though a small country it's obvious their government has invested in building their country up rather than steal what they can as so many countries leadership does.

comments.author: @EpicEarthYTB
comments.text: What a stunning journey through the UAE! I love the beautiful contrast between ancient traditions and modern innovation shown in this video.

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: Thank you so much for your kind words; it’s truly a unique country where the past and future meet! 😊

comments.author: @TRUEEARTH4k
comments.text: Behind the luxury skylines and trillion-dollar oil wealth, the United Arab Emirates hides a world of strict traditions, desert survival, migrant dreams, and realities most tourists never discover.

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: Thank you for noticing those deeper layers—it was our goal to show the reality beyond the skyscrapers. 😊

comments.author: @trongnghia31-10
comments.text: 54:34 I really enjoy the documentaries you make. Watching them makes us feel like we're actually traveling. Thank you!

comments.author: @InsidetheMystery88
comments.text: This video gave me a very different perspective on the UAE—not just oil and skyscrapers, but the human lives behind that wealth. Thank you for exploring such a grounded angle.

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: I’m so glad you appreciated that perspective; it was really important for us to highlight the human stories behind the scenery! ❤️
